name: register
description: Create your custodial Injective wallet (stored encrypted in Supabase)

name: balance
description: INJ, Peggy/Test USDT, other bank denoms, watchlist tokens, and project points

options.name: amount
options.description: Amount in human units (e.g. INJ or USDT decimals)

options.name: token
options.description: Token to send (default INJ). Type to search; add more via web dashboard watchlist.

name: tip
description: Send INJ, Peggy/Test USDT, or dashboard watchlist tokens to a registered member

options.name: create
options.description: Create a new points currency (guild owner only)

options.name: list
options.description: List point currencies in this server

options.name: mint
options.description: Mint points to a member (guild owner only)

options.name: send
options.description: Send your points to another member

options.name: balance
options.description: Show your balance for one currency

name: points
description: Project points for this server (capped supply, stored in Supabase)
